hero.description: KPMG's Digital Foundation practice delivers enterprise-grade artificial intelligence — from strategy through implementation — to organizations shaping the Middle East's transformation.

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: Six integrated service pillars that take organizations from AI ambition to enterprise-scale impact.

readiness.title: AI Readiness Assessment
readiness.description: Evaluate your organization's maturity, infrastructure, talent, and governance readiness to adopt AI at scale.

strategies.title: AI Strategies
strategies.description: Define a tailored AI roadmap aligned with your national and organizational objectives, from vision to execution.

platforms.title: AI Platforms
platforms.description: Design and implement enterprise-grade AI platforms that enable scalable model development, deployment, and monitoring.

factories.title: AI Factories
factories.description: Operationalize AI delivery through industrialized, repeatable frameworks — from data pipelines to model lifecycle management.

solutions.title: AI Solutions
solutions.description: Deliver purpose-built AI applications that solve real business problems — from intelligent automation to predictive analytics.

cloud.title: Cloud
cloud.description: Architect and manage secure, scalable cloud infrastructure — from migration strategy to multi-cloud governance and cost optimization.

products.title: Our Products
products.intro: Purpose-built applications and platforms designed to accelerate AI adoption across the Middle East.

creativeContent.title: Creative Content Agent
creativeContent.description: AI-powered presentation builder that transforms briefs into polished, brand-compliant KPMG slide decks in seconds.

sahab.title: Sahab Data Platform
sahab.description: A centralized, governed data platform for ingestion, transformation, cataloging, and serving — built for Middle East enterprise scale.

dataOwner.title: Data Owner Agent
dataOwner.description: An intelligent assistant that helps data owners manage classification, business definitions, quality rules, and PII detection across their data assets.

compliance.title: Compliance Platform
compliance.description: Automated regulatory compliance checker against regional frameworks (NDMO, PDPL, SAMA, DGA, SDAIA).

cta.description: Partner with KPMG's Digital Foundation team to unlock the full potential of Digital Foundation for your enterprise.

footer.description: Enterprise-grade artificial intelligence — from strategy through implementation — for organizations shaping the Middle East's digital transformation.

common.copyright: © 2026 KPMG Middle East. All rights reserved.
